title: 1.1: Patch includes a MATCH_ALL test case that expects a match when all pattern components are present
1.2: Patch includes a MATCH_ALL negative case expected not to match when a pattern token appears only as a substring of a larger alphanumeric token
1.3: Patch includes a MATCH_ANY test case that expects a match when any single pattern component is present
1.4: Patch includes a MATCH_ANY negative case expected not to match when pattern components occur only as substrings inside larger tokens
1.5: Patch includes a MATCH_LITERAL test case that expects a match when the full pattern appears as an exact contiguous substring
1.6: Patch includes a MATCH_LITERAL negative case expected not to match for a near-miss where parts appear but not as the exact contiguous substring
1.7: Patch includes a MATCH_REGEX test case using a regex that requires word characters between two terms and expects a match on a satisfying string
1.8: Patch includes a MATCH_REGEX negative case expected not to match when the two terms are not connected by word characters for that regex
1.9: Patch includes a MATCH_FUZZY positive case expected to match a close variant where the pattern is not a literal contiguous substring
1.11: Patch includes a MATCH_FUZZY negative case expected not to match a clearly different address-like string
2.1: Patch places new tests under src/documents/tests/test_matchables.py
3.1: Patch keeps tests within Django TestCase-based classes
3.2: Patch uses the test_ prefix for new test method names
3.3: Patch uses the existing matching test harness for assertions
3.4: Patch keeps TestMatching _test_matching calls on the default case-sensitivity setting
4.1: Patch includes MATCH_ALL coverage with an unquoted alphabetic token in the pattern
4.2: Patch includes MATCH_ALL coverage with a numeric token in the pattern
4.3: Patch includes MATCH_ALL coverage with a quoted multi-word phrase in the pattern
4.4: Patch includes MATCH_ANY coverage with an unquoted alphabetic token in the pattern
4.5: Patch includes MATCH_ANY coverage with a numeric token in the pattern
4.6: Patch includes MATCH_ANY coverage with a quoted multi-word phrase in the pattern
4.7: Patch includes a MATCH_ANY quoted-phrase pattern that contains leading or trailing whitespace inside the quotes and is expected to match
4.8: Patch includes MATCH_LITERAL coverage using a digit-containing literal pattern
